startUrls.title: YouTube URLs
startUrls.description: YouTube video, playlist, or channel URLs. The actor auto-detects the URL type and extracts transcripts from all discovered videos.

videoIds.title: Video IDs
videoIds.description: Direct YouTube video IDs (11-character strings). Faster than full URLs.

searchTerms.title: Search Terms
searchTerms.description: Search YouTube for these terms and extract transcripts from the results.

language.title: Preferred Language
language.description: ISO language code for the transcript. Falls back to any available language if not found.
language.sectionDescription: Configure language, format, and content preferences

includeAutoGenerated.title: Include Auto-Generated Captions
includeAutoGenerated.description: If enabled, auto-generated (speech-to-text) captions are used when manual captions are not available.

translationLanguage.title: Translate To
translationLanguage.description: Translate the transcript to this language using YouTube's built-in translation. Leave empty to use original language.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: Format for the transcript output. JSON includes timestamps, plaintext is just text.

includeTimestamps.title: Include Timestamps
includeTimestamps.description: Include start time and duration for each transcript segment (JSON format only).

includeVideoMetadata.title: Include Video Metadata
includeVideoMetadata.description: Include video title, channel, views, publish date, description, and thumbnail URL.

maxItems.title: Max Videos
maxItems.description: Maximum number of video transcripts to extract. Use 0 for unlimited.
maxItems.sectionDescription: Control how much data the actor scrapes

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum parallel requests. YouTube has generous rate limits, so 10-20 works well.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies are recommended for YouTube to avoid bot detection.
